modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Locked out of Financial Aid access on USD portal

full_description_text:
- I tried to access the financial aid tab on my USD portal.  
- It says my access is disabled after I entered my ID number and PIN.  
- The error message states that my web access has been disabled.  
- I need help to find out why this happened.
short_description: Locked out of Financial Aid access on USD portal
